headline: Assessing Deere (DE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Undervaluation Signals
summary: Stock performance snapshot and business mix Deere (DE) is drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 0.3% gain over the past day, a 3.1% decline over the past week, and a 4.8% decline over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Deere has delivered a 19.4% total return, with year to date and 1 year total returns of 23.0% and 21.0%. Longer term, 3 year and 5 year total returns stand at 48.8% and 71.5%.
